merged_events.event_description: The American Legation was established in Addis Ababa when U.S. Minister Resident and Consul General Hoffman Philip presented his credentials.

evidence.quote: The American Legation was established on July 6, 1909, when U.S. Minister Resident and Consul General Hoffman Philip presented his credentials in Addis Ababa.

merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Addis Ababa was closed following the Italian occupation of Ethiopia. The U.S. Minister departed on March 4, 1937, and the consulate was closed after March 31, 1937.

evidence.quote: U.S. Minister Resident and Consul General Cornelius Van H. Engert departed Addis Ababa on March 4, 1937, and the consulate was closed after March 31, 1937.

merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Addis Ababa was reopened when U.S. Minister Resident and Consul General John K. Caldwell presented his credentials.

evidence.quote: The American Legation in Addis Ababa reopened on August 31, 1943, when U.S. Minister Resident and Consul General John K. Caldwell presented his credentials.

merged_events.event_description: The American Legation in Addis Ababa was elevated to Embassy status when Ambassador George R. Merrell presented his credentials.

evidence.quote: The American Legation in Addis Ababa was elevated to Embassy status on June 28, 1949, when Ambassador George R. Merrell presented his credentials

merged_events.event_description: U.S. Legation effectively closed following Italian occupation of Addis Ababa; Engert left post on May 4, 1937, with no successor until 1943.

evidence.quote: Cornelius Van Hemert Engert, Minister Resident/Consul General. Appointed: 1936-02-07. Credentials presented: 1936-04-30. Italian forces occupied Addis Ababa on 1936-05-06. Note: Engert left post on May 4, 1937.

matched.notes: Exact match. Both record the establishment of the American Legation in Addis Ababa on 1909-07-06.

CSV date 1937-03-31 matches RDCR (Event 1), which says the consulate was closed 'after March 31, 1937.' POCOM (Event 4) gives May 4, 1937 as the date Engert left post, which is a personnel departure date rather than the institutional closure date. RDCR is the primary source, so CSV is correct to use March 31.
Exact match. Both record the reopening of the American Legation in Addis Ababa on 1943-08-31.
Exact match. Both record the elevation of the Legation to Embassy status on 1949-06-28.
